lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, [player name], but I need some help with a bee hive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooh, a bee hive. I'll help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Buzz off!

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Ah, [player name]. I'm sorry to drag you away like this, but I need some help building a new hive for my bees.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you expect me to do?

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: All the parts of the beehive are jumbled up. You've got to put them in the correct order for building a hive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, very well. Let's take a look...

sections.title: After closing the interface and talking with him again

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Ready to try again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: First remind me of what I'm doing.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: All the parts of the beehive are jumbled up. You've got to put them in the correct order for building a hive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, let me get on with it.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong first time

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll let you have 5 more tries.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong twice

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll let you have 4 more tries.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong three times

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll let you have 3 more tries.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong four times

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll let you have 2 more tries.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong five times

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll let you have one more try.

sections.title: After building the beehive wrong six times

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Uh-oh, the bees are fed up with waiting for you to build them a home!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aaaaargh - BEES!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eek!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Beees!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I'll help you!

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: That's perfect! I'll get some bees moved in immediately.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Now, I'm sure I must have something to offer you for all your help...

sections.title: Talking to Bee keeper looking for another player

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Sorry, you're not the person I need.

sections.title: If the player completed the event or is in a zone where the random event isn't allowed

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Hello, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Please help me, [player name].

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: I need your help, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Can I borrow you for a minute, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Bee keeper
lines.text: Maybe later.
